pi_items.source: Verified via setup_task.sh source code (no product pre-created) and live environment check: 'SmartDesk Pro does NOT exist' in Section D of comprehensive_odoo_verification.log. The agent must create this product. Name is consistent between task.json description, metadata, desktop guide, and export_result.sh search query.

Verified via setup_task.sh (not pre-created) and live environment check: 'Motorized Lift Frame does NOT exist' in Section D. Consistent across task description, desktop guide BOM section, and export_result.sh search query.

Verified by tracing the task description ('Standard at $1,200') and the desktop guide ('Base Price: $1,200 (Standard size)'). The setup script does NOT set the base price — the agent must set it when creating the product. The value $1,200 is consistent across task.json description, metadata, and desktop guide. Independent math check: $1,200 + $200 (Walnut) = $1,400; $1,400 x 0.85 = $1,190; $1,190 x 8 = $9,520 — matches expected_total.

Verified from task description ('Large at +$300'), desktop guide ('Large (+$300)'), and independent math: Large/Oak = $1,200 + $300 = $1,500. Consistent across all references. Not pre-configured — agent must set this as a price_extra on the Size attribute value 'Large'.

Verified from task description ('Walnut +$200'), desktop guide ('Walnut (+$200)'), and pricing math: Standard/Walnut = $1,200 + $200 = $1,400. Consistent across all references. Not pre-configured — agent must set this as price_extra on Finish attribute value 'Walnut'.

Independently computed: 2 Size values (Standard, Large) x 3 Finish values (Oak, White, Walnut) = 6 variants. Consistent with task description ('producing 6 variants') and desktop guide ('6 variants total'). Odoo's product.attribute with create_variant='always' will generate exactly 6 product.product records.

Verified from task description, desktop guide ('Authorized Dealer Network'), and export_result.sh search query ('Authorized Dealer Network' via ilike). Not pre-created — live environment shows only 'Default USD pricelist' exists (Section F). Agent must create this pricelist.
Verified from task description ('1-4 units at list price') and desktop guide ('1-4 units: List price'). 0% discount = list price. Consistent across all references.

Verified from task description ('5-9 units at 15% off') and desktop guide ('5-9 units: 15% discount'). Critical for validation order: 8 units falls in this tier. Math: $1,400 x (1 - 0.15) = $1,190. Consistent.
Verified from task description ('10+ at 25% off') and desktop guide ('10+ units: 25% discount'). Consistent across all references.

Verified from task description ('manufacturing 1 unit of Standard/Walnut') and desktop guide ('Manufacture 1x Standard/Walnut'). In Odoo 17, variant names are typically displayed as 'SmartDesk Pro (Standard, Walnut)' or similar. The export_result.sh searches for variants by matching product_template_attribute_value_ids. Consistent.
Verified from task description ('manufacturing 1 unit') and desktop guide ('Manufacture 1x'). Consistent.

Independently derived from the BOM structure: Main BOM has 5 lines — Motorized Lift Frame (all variants), Hardware Kit (all variants), Oak Board (Oak only), White Laminate (White only), Walnut Board (Walnut only). For Standard/Walnut variant, only universal components + Walnut-restricted component apply: Motorized Lift Frame, Walnut Board, Hardware Kit. Verified against desktop guide surface mapping and task description.

Independently derived: Oak Board is restricted to Oak finish variants, White Laminate to White finish variants. A Standard/Walnut MO should NOT consume either. This is the core variant-conditional BOM check. Consistent with desktop guide and BOM structure.

Verified via live environment: customer exists with id=45, customer_rank=1, city=Portland, country=United States (Section B of verification log). Created by setup_task.sh. Export_result.sh searches for SO with partner_id=customer_id.
Consistent with task description and desktop guide. Export_result.sh checks SO lines against template variant IDs.
Verified from task description ('8x SmartDesk Pro Standard/Walnut') and desktop guide ('8x SmartDesk Pro'). 8 units falls in pricelist tier 2 (5-9 units, 15% discount). Consistent.

Independently computed: base $1,200 + Walnut extra $200 = $1,400 list price. With 15% discount (tier 2, qty 8): $1,400 x 0.85 = $1,190.00. Verified against desktop guide calculation: '($1,200 + $200) x 0.85 = $1,190.00'. Exact match.

Independently computed: $1,190.00 x 8 = $9,520.00. Verified against desktop guide ('Total = $9,520.00') and task description ('The order total must be $9,520.00'). Exact match. No tax should be applied (Odoo default for untaxed products).

Verified via live environment XML-RPC: product exists (tmpl=44, prod=54), cost=$85.00, ref=LIN-ACT, vendor=TechMotion Supply @ $85.00, stock=100 units. Section C of comprehensive_odoo_verification.log.
Verified via live environment XML-RPC: product exists (tmpl=45, prod=55), cost=$120.00, ref=CTRL-UNIT, vendor=TechMotion Supply @ $120.00, stock=100 units.
Verified via live environment XML-RPC: product exists (tmpl=46, prod=56), cost=$15.00, ref=CBL-HRNS, vendor=TechMotion Supply @ $15.00, stock=100 units.
Verified via live environment XML-RPC: product exists (tmpl=47, prod=57), cost=$95.00, ref=STL-FRM, vendor=Nordic Timber Co. @ $95.00, stock=100 units.
Verified via live environment XML-RPC: product exists (tmpl=48, prod=58), cost=$180.00, ref=OAK-BRD, vendor=Nordic Timber Co. @ $180.00, stock=100 units.
Verified via live environment XML-RPC: product exists (tmpl=49, prod=59), cost=$110.00, ref=WHT-LAM, vendor=Nordic Timber Co. @ $110.00, stock=100 units.
Verified via live environment XML-RPC: product exists (tmpl=50, prod=60), cost=$220.00, ref=WNT-BRD, vendor=Nordic Timber Co. @ $220.00, stock=100 units.
Verified via live environment XML-RPC: product exists (tmpl=51, prod=61), cost=$25.00, ref=HW-KIT, vendor=Nordic Timber Co. @ $25.00, stock=100 units.

privileged_info_summary: The agent must create a product template 'SmartDesk Pro' with two attributes: Size (Standard, Large with +$300 extra) and Finish (Oak, White, Walnut with Walnut at +$200 extra), yielding exactly 6 variants. Base list price is $1,200. The agent must create a sub-assembly product 'Motorized Lift Frame' with a BOM containing: Linear Actuator x2, Steel Frame x1, Control Unit x1, Cable Harness x1. The main SmartDesk Pro BOM must have 5 component lines: Motorized Lift Frame x1 (all variants, no restriction), Hardware Kit x1 (all variants, no restriction), Oak Board x1 (restricted to Oak finish variants only), White Laminate x1 (restricted to White finish variants only), Walnut Board x1 (restricted to Walnut finish variants only). All 8 component products already exist in the database with stock=100 and vendor pricing pre-configured (TechMotion Supply for electronic components, Nordic Timber Co. for structural/surface components). The agent must create a pricelist named 'Authorized Dealer Network' with 3 tiers: min qty 1 at list price (0% discount), min qty 5 at 15% discount, min qty 10 at 25% discount. To validate the BOM, the agent must manufacture 1 unit of the Standard/Walnut variant; the MO should consume Motorized Lift Frame, Walnut Board, and Hardware Kit — NOT Oak Board or White Laminate. Finally, the agent must create and confirm a sales order for customer 'Cascade Furniture Partners' (already exists in database) with 8 units of SmartDesk Pro Standard/Walnut using the Authorized Dealer Network pricelist. The order total must be $9,520.00 (unit price = ($1,200 + $200) x 0.85 = $1,190.00; total = $1,190.00 x 8 = $9,520.00). The 8-unit quantity falls in pricelist tier 2 (5-9 units, 15% off). Customer 'Cascade Furniture Partners' has id=45 in the database. The Odoo login credentials are admin/admin (not admin@example.com).
